blockingIssues.description: ScenarioSwitcher still renders grey placeholder text via `placeholder:text-muted` on its initially empty token balance and deposit inputs, so the site does not yet satisfy the all-white-text contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a feature contract bans non-white text or other full-surface color regressions, require placeholder/pseudo-element inspection in browser or computed-style sweeps and in regression coverage, not only audits of standard text nodes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The failing review for `readability-white-text-everywhere-and-token-overhaul` found the worker's browser audit queried common text tags only, while `src/components/tokenomics/ScenarioSwitcher.tsx` still shipped grey placeholders via `placeholder:text-muted`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` should be false when required pre-change `.factory/library` review is omitted or only appears later in the transcript after implementation has started.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing review for `readability-transparent-liquid-metal-cards-complement-shader` found the handoff reported `followedProcedure: true` even though transcript-visible `.factory/library` review appeared only later in the session.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align shared readability and design-reference docs so `--text-muted` is consistently documented as border-only and liquid-metal card tokens consistently reflect the approved 0.04 / 0.08 / 0.12 no-blur card treatment.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer reports found `.factory/library` references still describing `--text-muted` as a text token and several shared design docs still listing older 0.10 / 0.15 / 0.20 card values even after the approved readability-fix card pass.
